---

## Feature description

Describe the feature or improvement clearly.

## Context

Explain why this feature is needed or useful.

## Proposed solution

Describe how you envision implementing this feature.

## Alternatives considered

Describe alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional information

Add any other context, links, screenshots, or related issues.
